headline_seed: Supreme Court weighs Trump's effort to end temporary protected status for Haitians, Syrians - NPR
draft_text:
The Supreme Court heard arguments today on TPS terminations affecting 350,000 Haitians and 6,100 Syrians. NBC News and the Los Angeles Times both report the ruling could ripple out to 1.3 million TPS holders from 17 countries.

And that's the mews.
